description: Style Note You'll catch every passing eye with this beautiful bracelet from estelle. The subtle design gives a touch of sophistication while the gold plating provides an exquisite sheen. Wear it to ensure that your next special occasion becomes a memorable one.Product Details Golden studded clamp bracelet, two hinge joints to provide flexibility, studded in the form of three strokes, slightly curved bracelet with metal fasteningMaterial and Care 24 carat gold platedPewter base metalHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSize Circumference of bracelet: 18 cm
